compiled_state.title: Brainstorm UX probe loop: static baseline for UI feature detection
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Feature teams using /dso:brainstorm to scope UI-heavy epics currently receive no design-dimension probes during Phase 1. The resulting epic specs lack structured UX intent (interaction criticality, non-happy-path state coverage, flow entry/exit, Surface manifestation), cascading into extra revision cycles at preplanning and rework in the ui-designer skill. This epic extends Phase 1 with a new Surface probe dimension in the Tell Me More loop, a UI intent classifier that runs on the confirmed Understanding Summary, a static UX probe set that fires once per UI epic, and a loop-back state machine so newly-surfaced intent gaps return to Tell Me More instead of terminating Phase 1 prematurely. A follow-on epic (aaa1-7100) will later replace the static probe set with dynamic principle injection from the reference corpus.

## Success Criteria
- Phase 1 Step 2 probe table includes a seventh dimension 'Surface' asking where the feature manifests (web page, form, screen, CLI flag, endpoint, background job, internal API, migration, or 'no user-facing surface'); Understanding Summary renders a Surface bullet alongside Problem/Users/Scope/Success. Verified by: brainstorm progressive validation test asserts Surface is present in the Summary schema block of SKILL.md.
- UI intent detection runs on the confirmed Understanding Summary using a keyword first-pass (matching a project-configurable surface-lexicon, default shipped with the plugin, overridable via brainstorm.ui_keywords in dso-config.conf) and a haiku classifier on ambiguous matches. On classifier dispatch failure (Agent tool unavailable, MAX_AGENTS=0, timeout, malformed output), detection falls through to non-UI with a logged degradation notice. Verified by: regression test that seeds three cases (clear UI, clear non-UI, ambiguous with mocked classifier failure) and asserts UX probe set routing (fires / doesn't fire / falls back).
- When UI intent is detected and the ux_probe_fired flag for the current epic ID is unset, the static UX probe set runs once and sets the flag: three probes covering interaction criticality, non-happy-path state coverage, and flow entry/exit, asked as free-text follow-up questions in the Phase 1 dialogue. The flag is keyed by epic ID at $ARTIFACTS_DIR/ux-probe-fired-<epic-id> so sequential brainstorm runs for different epics cannot suppress each other's probes.
- Phase 1 Gate Step 2 (Intent Gap Analysis) and the UX probe checkpoint both loop back to Tell Me More whenever an intent gap surfaces that genuinely increases epic understanding. Termination requires that the gap analysis produces an empty gap list AND the user confirms the Understanding Summary in the same turn. No numeric cap.
- Brainstorm SKILL.md carries an explicit anti-redundancy directive: before forming any question, the agent must check (a) prior conversation turns semantically (recognising paraphrase and negative signals like 'I told you' / 'I answered that'), and (b) the codebase via Grep/Read/Glob. Duplicate questions prohibited. Verified by: regression test that seeds a user answer covering one of the three UX probe topics and asserts the corresponding probe is suppressed in the recorded question log.
- For non-UI features, the UX probe set never fires; the non-UI cost is bounded to one keyword scan per confirmed Understanding Summary and zero classifier calls when the scan is unambiguous. Verified by: test run with a non-UI seed asserts the classifier dispatch code path is not entered (the degradation-notice log is the only emit path).
- In non-interactive mode (BRAINSTORM_INTERACTIVE=false), the UX probe set is skipped entirely: emit INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED with 'UX probes require user input' and tag the epic ui_probes:deferred so a subsequent interactive brainstorm run can complete them. Verified by: regression test invokes brainstorm with BRAINSTORM_INTERACTIVE=false on a UI seed and asserts (a) ui_probes:deferred tag is present on the resulting epic, (b) the probe questions are not asked.
- End-to-end dogfooding validation (primary sprint-executable signal): a new test in tests/skills/brainstorm/ invokes the Phase 1 flow on a representative UI feature seed ('add a benefits-status dashboard for claimants'); stubs the haiku classifier to return 'ui'; asserts that (a) the Understanding Summary contains a Surface bullet, (b) all three UX probes are asked during Phase 1, (c) the resulting ticket description contains the UX probe answers in a structured location (inline in description or a ## UX Probes section). Test passes before epic closure. SCs 1-7 verify component-level contracts and are necessary but not sufficient for epic closure; SC8 is the authoritative integration signal.

## Scenario Analysis
- ux_probe_fired flag persists across unrelated sessions (high, runtime): mitigated by SC3 — flag keyed by epic ID, not session or repo root.
- UI intent detection runs on unconfirmed Summary and misses Surface corrections (high, runtime): mitigated by SC2 — detection runs after user confirmation.
- Loop-back unbounded in sparse codebases (high, runtime): accepted tradeoff; SC4 termination discipline plus SC5 anti-redundancy prevent runaway dialogues in practice. No numeric cap per product decision.
- Haiku classifier dispatch fails mid-session (high, runtime): mitigated by SC2 — explicit fall-through to non-UI with logged degradation.
- Static probes duplicate TMM-answered questions (medium, runtime): mitigated by SC5 — anti-redundancy directive requires semantic check, not keyword-match.
- Non-interactive mode deadlocks on UX probes (high, configuration): mitigated by SC7 — probes skipped in non-interactive mode with deferred tag.
- Keyword lexicon not project-overridable (medium, configuration): mitigated by SC2 — dso-config.conf key brainstorm.ui_keywords for project overrides.

## Dependencies
None blocking. Forward-compatibility note: SC3 probe set should be structured so aaa1-7100 can replace the static probe content with dynamic retrieval from ref-query.sh without modifying the loop-back state machine in SC4.

## Approach
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md: add Surface to Phase 1 Step 2; add a UI-detection + static UX probe step as Phase 1 Step 2.5 (runs AFTER Phase 1 Gate Step 1 Summary confirmation); amend the Phase 1 Gate with loop-back logic; add a top-level anti-redundancy directive; define INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED path for non-interactive mode. Add two prompt files (ui-keyword-trigger.md, ui-detection-classifier.md) and a default surface-lexicon shipped in the plugin with project override via dso-config.conf (brainstorm.ui_keywords). Track ux_probe_fired as a per-epic artifact file ($ARTIFACTS_DIR/ux-probe-fired-<epic-id>). Add a new regression test file tests/skills/brainstorm/test-ux-probe-loop.sh covering SC2, SC5, SC6, SC7, and SC8.

### Planning Intelligence Log
- Web research (Step 2.6): not triggered
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: none (no external integration, no new dependency, no novel architectural pattern — haiku classifier dispatch is an established pattern)
- Scenario analysis (Step 2.75): triggered
  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 7
- Practitioner-requested additional cycles: none
- Follow-on scrutiny (Step 0): not triggered at primary-epic scope — aaa1-7100 is the intended follow-on but is reframed rather than newly created
- Feasibility resolution (Step 2.5): not triggered
- LLM-instruction signal (Step 5): triggered — this epic modifies brainstorm SKILL.md behavior (adds Surface dimension, UX probe loop, anti-redundancy directive)
- Scale context (Step 0): not applicable (no volume decision — agent workflow instrumentation)

Follow-on epic aaa1-7100 later replaces static probes with dynamic retrieval from the reference corpus.","successCriteria":["SC1: Phase 1 Step 2 probe table includes 7th 'Surface' dimension; Understanding Summary renders Surface bullet.","SC2: UI intent detection via keyword first-pass (configurable lexicon) + haiku classifier on ambiguous, with classifier-failure fall-through.","SC3: When UI-detected and ux_probe_fired flag unset, static UX probe set runs once (3 probes) and sets flag at $ARTIFACTS_DIR/ux-probe-fired-<epic-id>.","SC4: Phase 1 Gate Step 2 + UX probe checkpoint loop back to Tell Me More on intent gap; termination requires empty gap list AND same-turn Summary confirmation.","SC5: Top-level anti-redundancy directive in SKILL.md (semantic + codebase check before any question).","SC6: Non-UI bounded to one keyword scan + zero classifier calls when unambiguous.","SC7: BRAINSTORM_INTERACTIVE=false skips probes, emits INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED, tags ui_probes:deferred.","SC8: End-to-end dogfooding test on UI seed stubs haiku classifier to 'ui' and asserts Surface bullet + 3 probes asked + probe answers in ticket description."]},"stories":[{"id":"2161-b788","title":"As a developer using /dso:brainstorm, I see Phase 1 probe the Surface dimension and include it in the Understanding Summary","description":"Add 7th Surface dimension to Phase 1 Step 2 probe table and extend Summary schema with Surface bullet. Regression test seeds answered probe topic and asserts probe suppression.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["SKILL.md carries top-level anti-redundancy directive with semantic + codebase check.","Regression test asserts one UX probe is suppressed when its topic is pre-answered.","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Directive top-level so it applies across all phases.","[Testing] S6 seed must not pre-answer any probe (cross-reference with S6).","[Interaction with S3] Anti-redundancy suppressing all candidates triggers S3's UNRESOLVABLE_INTENT_GAP escape."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["7616-cd63"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC5"},{"id":"7e54-6453","title":"As a CI operator running /dso:brainstorm non-interactively, UX probes defer cleanly with a ui_probes:deferred tag","description":"Non-interactive branch in Phase 1 Step 2.5: skip probes, emit INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED, tag epic ui_probes:deferred. SC8 wording suggests subdir \u2014 document chosen path in file header."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2161-b788","7616-cd63","8e8d-1c46","d7f4-0f20","7e54-6453"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC8"},{"id":"16b9-68f1","title":"As a developer running /dso:preplanning on a ui_probes:deferred epic, preplanning blocks until brainstorm completes interactively","description":"Add 'UI Probes Deferred Gate' to plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md \u2014 halt when epic has ui_probes:deferred tag, direct user to re-run brainstorm interactively.
